text:
The first scene is one of anticipation and curiosity—the glass barrier reminds me of both separation and possibility, like the threshold of something important. The quiet modernity and order invite reflection, but also make me aware of my solitude.

In the second scene, the presence of another person sparks a sense of connection. The vivid colors and exhibits hint at knowledge and innovation, making me feel eager to engage and learn. I am both observer and participant in the ongoing dance of curiosity and interaction, feeling alive and stimulated by ideas.
